creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
I am quite sure a repocopy is not what we want here. This PR modifies www/
 nanoblogger to use the latest version (3.4). Since version 3.3 an addition
 al package (nanoblogger-extra) exists and as I am using it I wanted to add
  this to the portstree to. This is www/nanoblogger-extra. It is an additio
 nal port but uses the same ${DATADIR} as www/nanoblogger. Maybe this cause
 d some confusion
 
 You can install www/nanoblogger without installing www/nanoblogger-extra b
 ut www/nanoblogger-extra is run-dependent on www/nanoblogger.
 
 I hope this clarifies the issue.
 
 If there are further questions let me know.
 
 Regards Tobias
